backend/main.mo: Defines product, order, user, and contact types with filters and maps, and includes product matching helpers and storage mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Lists feature evidence entries linking features to frontend files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Contains prewritten summaries of all major frontend files for reference or documentation.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point that mounts the React app and loads main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router routes and wraps the app with ThemeProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/ContactInf: Admin form for viewing and updating store contact info including phone, email, Instagram, and QR image upload. Loads existing data, handles uploads, and submits updates via mutation.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductFor: Dialog for creating or editing products with fields for details, sizes, availability, and image uploads. Supports loading existing product data and uploading images as ExternalBlobs.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductMan: Admin interface to list, add, edit, and delete products with preview images and action buttons. Integrates product dialog and delete confirmation flow.
frontend/src/components/admin/StripeSetu: Admin page to view and configure Stripe settings, including secret key and allowed countries. Loads current config, detects test mode, and updates settings through mutations.
frontend/src/components/CheckoutDialog.t: Checkout dialog handling UPI, card (Stripe redirect), and COD flows, mapping payment methods and placing orders.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer displaying copyright text with a heart icon and caffeine.ai link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Responsive header with navigation, login/logout handling, and admin/user-specific links.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Page layout combining Header, Footer, Outlet content, and ProfileSetupModal.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Product card showing image, type, name, description, price, and stock status with link to detail page.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal that prompts authenticated users without a profile to enter and submit basic personal details. Handles validation, saving via mutation, and success or error toasts.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches a backend actor tied to the current Internet Identity, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and provider for Internet Identity authentication, handling login, logout, and identity loading.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user data, products, orders, and related backend resources via an actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom light/dark theme variables and base utility styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page showing product management, payments, and contact info tabs with role-based access control.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page displaying phone, email, and Instagram info with QR code and loading states.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page featuring hero banner, featured products grid, and about section using product data.
frontend/src/pages/OrdersPage.tsx: Displays the authenticated user's orders with status, payment method, and product details, handling loading and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailurePage.ts: Shows a payment failure message with navigation options to retry shopping or contact support.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccessPage.ts: Shows a payment success confirmation with buttons to view orders or continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Fetches and displays detailed product info with images, size selection, and checkout initiation.
frontend/src/pages/ProductsPage.tsx: Lists products with filtering options for search, category, size, and price, using a sidebar or sheet for filters.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind theme, colors, animations, and plugins including typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking features, requirements, issues, and state versioning.
